name: viking_bronisze_e10_gray_third_pdf_accepted_90_95
description: Third gray Viking PDF accepted as a pragmatic 90-95 percent baseline. This is intentionally not tuned to force 100 percent on one difficult sheet.
scope: Accepted after E8 and E9 stayed stable; target is cross-PDF stability, not perfect local overfit.
Known tricky right title/notes/project text can create tiny 03-like false positives; solve that with forbidden/plan/title zones, not detector thresholds.
This PDF contains rotated, mirrored and diagonal gray symbols; the baseline protects diagonal gray geometry and coherent ink rescues.
Use this snapshot to catch regressions in counts/classes/locations while allowing small visual judgement in dense overlapping areas.
Legend template PNGs for this run are stored in backend/tests/fixtures/viking_bronisze_e10_gray/templates.
knownLimitations: A few dense/overlapping or title-block detections may still need manual exclusion zones.
Do not treat this golden as proof that every gray PDF is solved; it is the third accepted Viking gray baseline.
